summary: Typography overhaul testing: Inter font, Playfair Display headings, and size scale verified across key pages. Core font assignments working correctly. Critical issue: multiple components rendering text well below 14px despite html base 21px - inline/component styles override the global scale.

ui_bugs.component: Homepage — hero sidebar cards (LP-QFY-001, 5 MODULES ACTIVE, View/Run/Explore links)
ui_bugs.issue: Tiny text: card labels at 12.18px, code labels at 13.44px, CTA links at 13.65px. All below 14px minimum.
ui_bugs.selector: Homepage right-panel card labels and action links

ui_bugs.component: Knowledge Center — article filter buttons and article card metadata
ui_bugs.issue: Filter buttons (All) at 12.18px, article badge counts at 12.18px, article codes (LP-BRF-POST-01) at 11.55px, category labels at 11.55px, read times (~9 min) at 11.55px, CFR references at 11.55px.
ui_bugs.selector: Knowledge center filter buttons and article card spans/paragraphs

ui_bugs.issue: Stat row label text (MODULES, LESSONS, TOTAL RUNTIME, PILLARS INSTALLED, COACH VERIFICATIONS) at 11.55px — visually tiny against the large stat numbers.

issues: Login fails with provided credentials (vince@launchpathedu.com / safestart2024!) — 'Invalid credentials or insufficient access.' Cannot verify admin dashboard typography.

action_items: Fix tiny text: Components using sub-0.6rem sizes or px-based overrides that result in 11-13px text. The html base 21px is set correctly but component-level styles (likely Tailwind classes like text-xs, text-[11px], or inline fontSize) are bypassing it.
Specifically fix: homepage hero sidebar card labels, knowledge center article card metadata (codes, category, read time, CFR refs), and LaunchPath Standard stats labels.
Check admin login credentials — provided password 'safestart2024!' returning invalid credentials. Either credentials changed or there is a backend auth issue.
critical_code_review_comments: Root cause of tiny text: Components are likely using Tailwind's text-xs (0.75rem relative to Tailwind's 16px base = 12px) or hardcoded pixel values like font-size: 11px. When html base is 21px, 0.55rem = 11.55px. Search for font-size values in component files like 0.55rem, 0.58rem, 11px, 12px that produce sub-14px results.
The --text-xs CSS variable is 0.762rem = 16px at 21px base which is fine. But some components seem to be using even smaller values outside this system.
Label font computed at 14.994px on admission page (var(--text-xs) = 0.762rem * 21 ≈ 16px, but actual is 14.994px suggesting some components use a different base or override)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Typography is mostly working: Inter on body/nav/buttons/forms, Playfair Display on h1/h2/h3, html base 21px, hero H1 at 88px. Key issue: multiple small UI elements (article card metadata, filter buttons, stat labels, homepage card labels) are rendering at 11-13px. Search component files for hardcoded small px values or sub-0.6rem values. Admin login with provided credentials failing - cannot test admin admissions dashboard typography.
rca_of_issue: Tiny text root cause: Despite html { font-size: 21px }, components using Tailwind utility classes (text-xs = 0.75rem relative to Tailwind's 16px assumption = 12px) or inline styles with very small rem values (e.g. 0.55rem * 21px = 11.55px) bypass the intended scale. The global CSS sets --text-xs at 0.762rem (should be ~16px) but Tailwind classes don't use CSS variables - they compute from their own 16px rem base, resulting in 12px text.
